fields: Traditional and complementary medicine and therapy

Department of Biosciences.notes: Also absorbs the ISCED broad catch-all 'Natural sciences, mathematics and statistics', which really spans Biosciences, Chemistry, Physics, Earth Sciences and Mathematics jointly -- defaulted here for lack of a single natural home.

Department of Chemistry.notes: Also picks up chemical-engineering-adjacent ISCED fields (materials, textiles, chemical engineering) that have no dedicated engineering department at UniMi.

fields: Database and network design and administration
Software and applications development and analysis
Department of Computer Science \"Giovann.notes: UniMi has no Engineering faculty (that's Politecnico di Milano's remit), so all Engineering/manufacturing fields without a closer topical fit (electronics, mechanics, motor vehicles) are defaulted here as the nearest technical department.

Department of Cultural and Environmental.notes: UniMi has no Architecture faculty; Architecture/construction fields are defaulted here as the closest built-environment/heritage-adjacent department.

Department of Earth Sciences \"Ardito De.notes: Also picks up 'Mining and extraction', which has no other natural home at UniMi.

Department of Law \"Cesare Beccaria\".notes: ISCED's single 'Law' field can't be split further; UniMi actually teaches law across four departments (this one plus Italian and Supranational Public Law, Private Law and Legal History, and International Legal Historical and Political Studies) -- all assigned here as the flagship.

Department of Pathophysiology and Transp.notes: ISCED's single 'Medicine' field can't be split further; UniMi actually teaches/researches medicine across many departments (Biomedical Sciences for Health, Biomedical and Clinical Sciences 'L. Sacco', Clinical Sciences and Community Health, Medical Biotechnology and Translational Medicine, Oncology and Hematology-Oncology, etc.) -- assigned here as a representative general-medicine department.

Department of Philosophy.notes: UniMi has no dedicated Education/Teacher-training faculty, so all Education-related ISCED fields are defaulted here, historically the closest disciplinary home for pedagogy in the Italian system.

Department of Physics.notes: Also absorbs the ISCED narrow catch-all 'Physical sciences', which really spans Physics, Chemistry and Earth Sciences jointly -- defaulted here for lack of a single natural home.

fields: Care of the elderly and of disabled adults
Department of Social and Political Scien.notes: UniMi has no Psychology faculty and no vocational/services schools (hospitality, security, transport, personal care), so those ISCED fields are defaulted here as the broadest applied social-science department.

Unclassified.notes: Not a real UniMi department -- kept as an explicit exception rather than forced into one, since 'Field unknown' has no discipline to assign.
